title: Efficient Aviation
description: The Ultra-Efficient Aviation page covers NASA research to make the aviation community more economically and environmentally sustainable.
text:
Ultra-Efficient Aviation
NASA is working with others to enable future airliner designs to realize up to 30% less fuel use thanks to new ultra-efficient aviation technologies. These include innovative aircraft shapes, electrified propulsion, and others intended to make flight more economical and sustainable.
Aeronautics @ Home
A collection of activities and lessons to learn more about NASA Aeronautics and the science of flight that you can do at home.
